units.source_text: 財業務淨利息收益總額中扣除保險業務第三⽅淨利息收益，有關收益於2025年為4億美元（2024年：4億美元）。保險業務淨利息收益總額於財富管理業務的「費
units.translation_target_text: The total net interest income from the financial business is deducted from the third-party net interest income from the insurance business, which will be US$400 million in 2025 (2024: US$400 million). The total net interest income of the insurance business is divided into the “fees” of the wealth management business.
units.translation_en: The total net interest income from the financial business is deducted from the third-party net interest income from the insurance business, which will be US$400 million in 2025 (2024: US$400 million). The total net interest income of the insurance business is divided into the “fees” of the wealth management business.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The total net interest income from the financial business is deducted from the third-party net interest income from the insurance business, which will be US$400 million in 2025 (2024: US$400 million). The total net interest income of the insurance business is divided into the “fees” of the wealth management business.
